name: financial_statement_analyzer
description: Analyzes financial reports, calculates ratios, identifies trends, and provides investment insights. Integrates with SEC EDGAR to fetch public company filings automatically.

environment_variables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: OpenAI API key for GPT models

environment_variables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Anthropic API key for Claude models

example_usage:
```python
import asyncio
from financial_statement_analyzer import (
    analyze_financial_statements,
    quick_health_check,
    calculate_ratios_only
)

async def main():
    financial_data = {
        "income_statement": {
            "revenue": 1000000,
            "cost_of_goods_sold": 600000,
            "operating_income": 200000,
            "net_income": 150000
        },
        "balance_sheet": {
            "total_assets": 2000000,
            "current_assets": 500000,
            "total_liabilities": 800000,
            "current_liabilities": 300000,
            "total_equity": 1200000
        }
    }
    
    # Full financial analysis
    result = await analyze_financial_statements(financial_data)
    
    print(f"Overall Rating: {result.overall_rating}")
    print(f"Recommendation: {result.recommendation}")
    print(f"\nSummary: {result.summary}")
    
    print(f"\nKey Ratios:")
    print(f"  Net Margin: {result.ratios.net_margin:.2f}%")
    print(f"  Current Ratio: {result.ratios.current_ratio:.2f}")
    print(f"  ROE: {result.ratios.return_on_equity:.2f}%")
    
    print(f"\nRed Flags: {len(result.red_flags)}")
    for flag in result.red_flags:
        print(f"  [{flag.severity}] {flag.description}")
    
    # Quick health check
    health = await quick_health_check(financial_data)
    print(f"\nQuick Health Check:")
    print(f"  Profitability: {health['profitability']}")
    print(f"  Liquidity: {health['liquidity']}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(main())
```
post_add_instructions: This agent analyzes financial statements to calculate ratios, identify trends, detect red flags, and provide investment recommendations. It calculates profitability (margins, ROA, ROE), liquidity (current, quick, cash ratios), leverage (debt ratios), and efficiency metrics. Integrates with sec_edgar_tool to automatically fetch public company filings by ticker symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT). Provides comprehensive analysis with trend identification and actionable insights. Set your preferred LLM provider's API key.
